lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane NO-DEFAULTS remediation; the threshold-resolution helper test + config-loader fail-loud coverage drive the proofs.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: report.md '## Test Evidence': the price-drop threshold fallback now comes from fail-loud SST; TestResolvePriceDropThreshold_Precedence proves the trigger->filter->SST-default order and TestResolvePriceDropThreshold_UsesConfiguredDefault proves the fallback is the configured value (not a baked-in 0.10).

scenarios.title: Price-drop threshold resolves trigger -> user filter -> SST default with no hardcoded literal
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: resolvePriceDropThreshold returns trigger.Context[threshold_pct] when non-zero, else watch.Filters[threshold_pct] when non-zero, else the SST default; zero and absent are both treated as unset.

scenarios.title: The fallback is the configured SST default, not a baked-in 0.10
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: A configured default of 0.30 flows straight through when no trigger/filter override is present; the SST key RECOMMENDATIONS_WATCHES_DEFAULT_PRICE_DROP_THRESHOLD_PCT is required and fails loud (range (0,1]).
